message:
Expand core language: ForIn/ForOf, new expressions, full statement lowering, static analysis

AST (ast.rs, +2326 lines): add ForInStatement and ForOfStatement types
with binding/binding_kind/object/body fields and canonical_value()
serialization. Extends Statement enum, span(), and canonical dispatch.

Parser (parser.rs, +596 lines): parse for-in and for-of loops via
detect_for_in_of() dispatch. Add parse_new_expression() for `new Foo()`
syntax with nested constructor argument parsing. Add
parse_template_literal() for backtick template strings with ${expr}
interpolation. Move arrow function detection (try_parse_arrow_function)
to lowest precedence in parse_expression() before assignment, fixing
precedence ordering. Add statement_kind_label for ForIn/ForOf.

Static semantics (static_semantics.rs, +2416 lines): six new error
kinds: AssignmentToConst (const binding reassignment), ReturnOutside-
Function, BreakOutsideLoop, ContinueOutsideLoop, DuplicateParameter
(strict-mode functions), DeleteOfIdentifier (strict-mode delete).
AnalyzerState gains const_bindings tracking and in_function/in_loop/
in_switch context flags. analyze_statement() now recursively validates
all control-flow constructs with proper scope nesting, propagating
context flags and const binding detection through blocks, loops, switch
cases, try/catch, and function declarations.

IR contract (ir_contract.rs, +168 lines): 15 new Ir1Op variants:
BinaryOp, UnaryOp, AssignOp (compound assignment), Label/Jump/
JumpIfFalsy (control flow), GetProperty/SetProperty (object access),
NewArray/NewObject (allocation), Throw, LoadThis, DeclareFunction,
BeginTry/EndTry, Pop. Each variant implements canonical_value()
serialization.

Lowering pipeline (lowering_pipeline.rs, +2889 lines): replace all
LoadLiteral::Undefined placeholders with proper lowering. lower_-
statement_to_ir1() handles Block, If (with else_label/end_label
jumps), For (init/condition/update/body loop structure), ForIn/ForOf,
While, DoWhile, Return, Throw, TryCatch (BeginTry/EndTry), Switch
(discriminant + case label jumps), Break, Continue, and Function-
Declaration. lower_expression_to_ir1() handles Binary, Unary,
Assignment (simple + compound), Conditional (ternary), Call, Member,
This, ArrayLiteral, ObjectLiteral, and ArrowFunction.

Parser arena (parser_arena.rs): handle ForIn/ForOf in unsupported
statement error path. Multi-engine harness: add ForIn/ForOf allocation
estimates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1924,6 +1924,16 @@ fn estimate_statement_allocation_count(statement: &Statement) -> u64 {
             .saturating_add(estimate_statement_vec_allocation_count(
                 &function_decl.body.body,
             )),
+        Statement::ForIn(for_in_stmt) => 1_u64
+            .saturating_add(estimate_expression_allocation_count(&for_in_stmt.object))
+            .saturating_add(estimate_statement_allocation_count(
+                for_in_stmt.body.as_ref(),
+            )),
+        Statement::ForOf(for_of_stmt) => 1_u64
+            .saturating_add(estimate_expression_allocation_count(&for_of_stmt.iterable))
+            .saturating_add(estimate_statement_allocation_count(
+                for_of_stmt.body.as_ref(),
+            )),
     }
 }
